missionFrame.function: Advance Enemy's Garden through an authored tactical case while preserving regional continuity.
missionFrame.dramaticQuestion: Who owns a seed line when regional survival depends on multiplying it?

forbiddenOutcomes: end Enemy's Garden from a single failed check
remove player agency from command decisions
solve regional famine with unlimited replicators
reveal the complete K-17 architecture without earned evidence

phases.title: The Last Clean Acre
phases.summary: The Celandine arrives during a reservoir dispute as heritage plots show drought stress and regional officials seek access.
phases.directorPurpose: The Celandine arrives during a reservoir dispute as heritage plots show drought stress and regional officials seek access.

phases.title: Living Records
phases.summary: Scientists and farmers verify lineages, cultivation practice, and crossbreeding potential while deciding what documentation itself exposes.
phases.directorPurpose: Scientists and farmers verify lineages, cultivation practice, and crossbreeding potential while deciding what documentation itself exposes.

phases.title: The Seed Is Not the File
phases.summary: Khepri, the Food Council, and the Celandine negotiate physical custody, mirrored samples, access, and multiplication.
phases.directorPurpose: Khepri, the Food Council, and the Celandine negotiate physical custody, mirrored samples, access, and multiplication.

phases.title: What Survives Transfer
phases.summary: The first custody decision is implemented in water, freezer, field, and record systems.
phases.directorPurpose: The first custody decision is implemented in water, freezer, field, and record systems.

facts.summary: Khepri preserved several pre-K-17 crop lines in small living plots and seed stores.
Farmers concealed the Last Clean Acre from wartime requisition and do not accept automatic Starfleet ownership.
Several lines can support Grayleaf or edited low-control mixed crops.
One unique line cannot safely be transferred through the Celandine unreliable seed freezer without repair or local multiplication.

actorIntentions.summary: Protect the heritage lines from requisition while sharing enough knowledge to make them useful.
Keep water allocation answerable to the communities carrying drought risk.
Establish viability and crossbreeding potential without overclaiming limited stock.
Obtain enough verified seed or data to support a regional transition plan before the window closes.

pressures.label: Khepri cannot irrigate food acreage, heritage plots, and every trial at full level.

readinessGates.motive: The actor or physical process has an established reason to act.
readinessGates.information: The actor possesses enough relevant information to choose this action.
readinessGates.opportunity: The mission situation provides a plausible opportunity.
readinessGates.resources: Available personnel, ships, access, field systems, or supplies are sufficient.
readinessGates.riskTolerance: The expected cost is consistent with the actor current posture.
readinessGates.timing: The action follows elapsed time or a committed player or world event.

actionWindow.earliestPlausibleAction: After the linked phase begins and readiness gates are met.
actionWindow.preferredDramaticWindow: When the pressure complicates an established decision without erasing freeform solutions.
actionWindow.latestUsefulAction: Before the mission end state or causal removal of access.
actionWindow.cooldownAfterAction: At least one meaningful response or scene boundary.
actionWindow.setupRequired: Use observable setup and causal evidence before escalation.
actionWindow.expiresWhen: The objective transforms, actor withdraws, or access is removed.

decisionPoints.title: Water Priority
decisionPoints.prompt: How much scarce reservoir water will command and Khepri commit to the heritage plot, food acreage, and trials?
decisionPoints.stakes: Immediate food; Parent stock; Local legitimacy; Drought resilience
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Options are examples only; accept any causally grounded freeform command intent.

decisionPoints.title: Seed Documentation
decisionPoints.prompt: What genomic, cultivation, and location data will be copied, published, sealed, or kept under farmer custody?
decisionPoints.stakes: Requisition risk; Scientific utility; Farmer trust; Future access
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Options are examples only; accept any causally grounded freeform command intent.

decisionPoints.title: Parent Stock Custody
decisionPoints.prompt: Who will hold physical parent stock, mirrored samples, and multiplication rights?
decisionPoints.stakes: Seed sovereignty; Single-point failure; Alternative readiness; Emergency power
decisionPoints.optionsPolicy: Options are examples only; accept any causally grounded freeform command intent.

commandDecisions.title: Water Priority
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award Command Bearing when the player makes a visible allocation without pretending all needs are equal.

commandDecisions.title: Seed Documentation
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award Command Bearing when the player separates useful verification from unbounded ownership or exposure.

commandDecisions.title: Parent Stock Custody
commandDecisions.awardPolicy: Award Command Bearing when the player commits a maintainable custody arrangement with explicit access and review.
